description: Deep historical, ecological, geological, or cosmic time is 'tholua'. An ancient forest, practice, stone, or star belongs to a timescale larger than one ordinary life. 'serao' (old) is relative to the immediate context; 'tholua' makes the exceptional duration part of the claim.
articulatory_notes: Place the tongue tip lightly at or between the teeth for unvoiced 'th' and let air pass into true-mid back rounded 'o'. Touch the tongue tip to the alveolar ridge for lateral 'l', release along the sides into stressed high-back rounded 'u', then open into a separate central 'a' syllable without inserting a glide.
sound_symbolism: The sustained dental fricative opens into rounded vowels before the final 'u.a' hiatus widens to unrounded 'a'. The drawn-out opening gives a bodily cue to the long span the word describes.

semantic_domains.temporal: existence or origin in a past far beyond ordinary age
